title: Looking for Category Manager at BigBasket

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at BigBasket
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a Category Manager in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
